inputs.titre: Construction du Pont Neuf à Paris

reason: The image depicts the construction of a bridge with period-appropriate clothing, architecture, and activities. The general atmosphere aligns well with the time. There are some possible inaccuracies and inconsistencies in the architecture of surrounding buildings, however. It shows details such as stone construction, wooden boats, and scaffolding appropriate for the period. The buildings in the background seem anachronistic with style and height variations.
